name: minecraft-modpack
postCreateCommand:
set -e; python -m pip install --upgrade pip; curl -Lso /usr/local/lib/packwiz.jar https://github.com/packwiz/packwiz/releases/latest/download/packwiz.jar; printf '%s
' '#!/bin/sh' 'exec java -jar /usr/local/lib/packwiz.jar "$@"' > /usr/local/bin/packwiz; chmod +x /usr/local/bin/packwiz; if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; if command -v sudo >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y git-lfs; else apt-get update && apt-get install -y git-lfs; fi; elif command -v apk >/dev/null 2>&1; then if command -v sudo >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo apk add --no-cache git-lfs; else apk add --no-cache git-lfs; fi; fi; git lfs install
